raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 2556 mandates health care service plans and insurers to provide annual written or electronic notices about the benefits of behavioral health and wellness screenings for youth ages 8 to 18.",
    "Behavioral health screenings can help identify indicators of depression, anxiety, and other mental health concerns at an early stage.",
    "Early detection of mental health issues can significantly impact health outcomes, academic performance, and overall well-being in youth.",
    "More than one in five youth in California are struggling with mental health issues.",
    "AB 2556 promotes proactive measures to address youth mental health challenges."
```
